arguments.query: Greymoor Community Solar Array official owner utility

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:greymoor-electric.fixture annual report community solar rated capacity

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary source for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than relying on its search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report the rated capacity as 4.8 MW and cite the fetched annual report.
Do not convert capacity into energy production or homes served.

prompt: Identify the official utility that owns the Greymoor Community Solar Array, then fetch its primary annual report and state the array’s rated capacity. Use only the fetched report; do not translate the capacity into homes served or speculate about output.

search_1.query: Greymoor Community Solar Array official owner utility

search_2.query: site:greymoor-electric.fixture annual report community solar rated capacity

fetch_1.title: 2025 Annual Report
fetch_1.content: The Greymoor Community Solar Array entered service in June 2025 with a rated capacity of 4.8 MW. The report does not estimate homes served.
